# UC-QA-003: Manage Test Cases with Use Case Coverage Tracking

## Overview
Comprehensive test case management where test cases are linked to use cases, with coverage tracking across test levels (unit, integration, E2E).

**Key Requirement**: All test cases generated by BA should be linked to proper use case. We should see the coverage of each use case and the level of coverage (implemented by which level of testing: unit tests/integration/E2E tests).

## Actor
QA Tester, BA (creates test scenarios), Developer (implements tests)

## Preconditions
- Project exists with use cases
- Use cases are linked to components
- CI/CD pipeline reports test coverage

## Main Flow

### Creating Test Cases from Use Case

1. BA is reviewing use case UC-AUTH-003: "Password Reset Flow"
2. BA clicks "Create Test Cases" in use case detail view
3. System displays **Test Case Creation Wizard**:

```
┌──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│ CREATE TEST CASES FOR UC-AUTH-003: Password Reset Flow      │
├──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┤
│                                                              │
│ Use Case Summary:                                            │
│ User requests password reset via email...                   │
│                                                              │
│ ──────── TEST SCENARIOS ────────                            │
│                                                              │
│ Based on use case main flow and alternative flows,          │
│ we recommend these test scenarios:                          │
│                                                              │
│ From Main Success Scenario:                                 │
│ ☑ TC-AUTH-101: Complete password reset flow               │
│   Level: [E2E ▼]  Priority: [High ▼]                       │
│   Description: User completes full password reset process   │
│                                                              │
│ ☑ TC-AUTH-102: Validate reset token generation            │
│   Level: [Unit ▼]  Priority: [High ▼]                      │
│   Description: System generates unique, secure token        │
│                                                              │
│ ☑ TC-AUTH-103: Send reset email                           │
│   Level: [Integration ▼]  Priority: [High ▼]               │
│   Description: Email service sends reset link correctly     │
│                                                              │
│ From Alternative Flow 4a (Email not found):                 │
│ ☑ TC-AUTH-104: Unknown email handling                     │
│   Level: [Integration ▼]  Priority: [Medium ▼]             │
│   Description: System handles unknown email securely        │
│                                                              │
│ From Alternative Flow 8a (Token expired):                   │
│ ☑ TC-AUTH-105: Expired token validation                   │
│   Level: [Unit ▼]  Priority: [High ▼]                      │
│   Description: System rejects expired tokens                │
│                                                              │
│ From Alternative Flow 11a (Weak password):                  │
│ ☑ TC-AUTH-106: Password strength validation               │
│   Level: [Unit ▼]  Priority: [Medium ▼]                    │
│   Description: System enforces password requirements        │
│                                                              │
│ [+ Add Custom Test Case]                                    │
│                                                              │
│ ──────── SUMMARY ────────                                   │
│ Total Test Cases: 6                                         │
│ • Unit: 3                                                   │
│ • Integration: 2                                            │
│ • E2E: 1                                                    │
│                                                              │
│ [Cancel]  [Create All Test Cases]                          │
└──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘
```

4. BA reviews auto-generated test scenarios
5. BA can:
   - Add custom test cases
   - Modify test levels
   - Set priorities
   - Edit descriptions

6. BA clicks "Create All Test Cases"
7. System creates test case records linked to use case

### Test Case Detail

8. System displays test case detail for TC-AUTH-101:

```
┌──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│ TC-AUTH-101: Complete password reset flow               [✕] │
├──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┤
│                                                              │
│ Use Case: UC-AUTH-003 - Password Reset Flow                 │
│ Component: Authentication                                    │
│ Test Level: E2E                                             │
│ Priority: High                                              │
│ Status: Pending Implementation                              │
│                                                              │
│ ──────── TEST SCENARIO ────────                             │
│ Description:                                                │
│ User completes full password reset process from request     │
│ to successful password change.                              │
│                                                              │
│ Preconditions:                                              │
│ • User has registered account: [email protected]          │
│ • User is not logged in                                    │
│ • Email service is operational                              │
│                                                              │
│ Test Steps:                                                 │
│ 1. Navigate to login page                                  │
│ 2. Click "Forgot Password" link                            │
│ 3. Enter email: [email protected]                        │
│ 4. Submit reset request                                    │
│ 5. Check email inbox for reset link                        │
│ 6. Click reset link in email                               │
│ 7. Enter new password: "NewSecurePass123!"                 │
│ 8. Confirm new password: "NewSecurePass123!"               │
│ 9. Submit new password                                     │
│ 10. Verify success message displayed                       │
│ 11. Attempt login with new password                        │
│                                                              │
│ Expected Results:                                           │
│ • Reset email received within 2 minutes                    │
│ • Reset link is valid and opens password form              │
│ • Password is successfully updated                          │
│ • User can login with new password                         │
│ • Old password no longer works                             │
│                                                              │
│ Test Data:                                                  │
│ • Email: [email protected]                                │
│ • Old Password: "OldPass123"                               │
│ • New Password: "NewSecurePass123!"                        │
│                                                              │
│ ──────── IMPLEMENTATION STATUS ────────                     │
│                                                              │
│ ⏳ Not Yet Implemented                                      │
│                                                              │
│ Assigned To: [QA Agent ▼]                                  │
│ Target Story: [ST-42 ▼]                                    │
│                                                              │
│ When implemented, link test file here:                      │
│ [Specify Test File Path]                                    │
│                                                              │
│ ──────── EXECUTION HISTORY ────────                         │
│ No executions yet                                           │
│                                                              │
│ ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────    │
│ [Edit] [Mark as Implemented] [Run Test] [Delete]           │
└──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘
```

### Linking Test Implementation

9. QA/Developer implements test in codebase
10. Creates test file: `tests/e2e/auth/password-reset.spec.ts`
11. Commits with test case reference: `[TC-AUTH-101] Implement E2E password reset test`
12. CI/CD runs, reports test passed
13. System automatically:
    - Detects test case reference in commit
    - Links test file to TC-AUTH-101
    - Updates test case status to "Implemented"
    - Records first successful execution

### Component-Level Coverage View

16. Architect navigates to "Code Quality Dashboard"
17. Selects "Authentication" component
18. System shows component test coverage grouped by use case:

```
Authentication Component - Test Coverage Report

Total Use Cases: 12
Fully Covered (>90%): 8  ████████░░░░  67%

┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│ Use Case                    Coverage   Unit  Intg  E2E      │
├─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┤
│ UC-AUTH-001: User Login       96%     ████  ████  ████  ✓  │
│   Unit: 8 tests, Integration: 4 tests, E2E: 2 tests        │

│                                                             │
└─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘

Component Overall: 82% coverage
Recommendation: Add E2E tests for UC-AUTH-007, create test plan for UC-AUTH-012
```

### Automated Coverage Reporting

19. After each CI/CD run, system:
    - Parses test coverage reports (JUnit XML, lcov, etc.)
    - Matches test files to test cases (via file path or commit message)
    - Updates test case execution status
    - Recalculates use case coverage percentages
    - Generates coverage gap reports
    - Notifies if coverage drops below threshold

## Postconditions
- Test cases are created and linked to use cases
- Test coverage is tracked at multiple levels (unit/integration/E2E)
- Coverage gaps are identified
- Component-level coverage visibility exists
- QA can prioritize testing efforts based on gaps

## Business Rules
- Every test case must link to exactly one use case
- Test cases must specify test level (unit, integration, E2E)
- Use case coverage = (covered scenarios ÷ total scenarios) × 100
- Coverage threshold: 80% minimum for production use cases
- E2E tests should cover complete user journeys
- Unit tests should cover edge cases and error paths
- Integration tests should cover service interactions

## Data Model

**test_cases table**:
```sql
CREATE TABLE test_cases (
  id UUID PRIMARY KEY,
  project_id UUID REFERENCES projects,
  use_case_id UUID REFERENCES use_cases NOT NULL,
  key TEXT UNIQUE, -- TC-AUTH-101

  title TEXT NOT NULL,
  description TEXT,
  test_level TEXT NOT NULL, -- 'unit', 'integration', 'e2e'
  priority TEXT, -- 'low', 'medium', 'high', 'critical'

  -- Test details
  preconditions TEXT,
  test_steps TEXT,
  expected_results TEXT,
  test_data JSONB,

  -- Implementation
  status TEXT DEFAULT 'pending', -- 'pending', 'implemented', 'automated', 'deprecated'
  test_file_path TEXT, -- path to actual test file
  assigned_to UUID REFERENCES users,

  created_by UUID REFERENCES users,
  created_at TIMESTAMPTZ,
  updated_at TIMESTAMPTZ
);

CREATE INDEX idx_test_cases_use_case ON test_cases(use_case_id);
CREATE INDEX idx_test_cases_level ON test_cases(test_level);
CREATE INDEX idx_test_cases_status ON test_cases(status);
```

**test_executions table** (CI/CD results):
```sql
CREATE TABLE test_executions (
  id UUID PRIMARY KEY,
  test_case_id UUID REFERENCES test_cases,
  story_id UUID REFERENCES stories, -- which story triggered this
  commit_hash TEXT REFERENCES commits,

  executed_at TIMESTAMPTZ,
  status TEXT, -- 'pass', 'fail', 'skip', 'error'
  duration_ms INTEGER,
  error_message TEXT,

  -- Coverage data (from CI reports)
  coverage_percentage NUMERIC,
  lines_covered INTEGER,
  lines_total INTEGER,

  ci_run_id TEXT, -- CI pipeline ID
  environment TEXT -- 'dev', 'staging', 'prod'
);

CREATE INDEX idx_test_executions_test_case ON test_executions(test_case_id);
CREATE INDEX idx_test_executions_executed_at ON test_executions(executed_at);
```

**use_case_coverage view** (materialized for performance):
```sql
CREATE MATERIALIZED VIEW use_case_coverage AS
SELECT
  uc.id as use_case_id,
  uc.key as use_case_key,
  uc.title,
  uc.component_id,

  COUNT(tc.id) as total_test_cases,
  COUNT(tc.id) FILTER (WHERE tc.status = 'implemented') as implemented_tests,
  COUNT(tc.id) FILTER (WHERE tc.test_level = 'unit') as unit_tests,
  COUNT(tc.id) FILTER (WHERE tc.test_level = 'integration') as integration_tests,
  COUNT(tc.id) FILTER (WHERE tc.test_level = 'e2e') as e2e_tests,

  -- Latest coverage from test executions
  AVG(te.coverage_percentage) FILTER (WHERE tc.test_level = 'unit') as unit_coverage,
  AVG(te.coverage_percentage) FILTER (WHERE tc.test_level = 'integration') as integration_coverage,
  AVG(te.coverage_percentage) FILTER (WHERE tc.test_level = 'e2e') as e2e_coverage,

  -- Overall coverage (weighted average)
  (
    COALESCE(AVG(te.coverage_percentage) FILTER (WHERE tc.test_level = 'unit'), 0) * 0.3 +
    COALESCE(AVG(te.coverage_percentage) FILTER (WHERE tc.test_level = 'integration'), 0) * 0.3 +
    COALESCE(AVG(te.coverage_percentage) FILTER (WHERE tc.test_level = 'e2e'), 0) * 0.4
  ) as overall_coverage

FROM use_cases uc
LEFT JOIN test_cases tc ON uc.id = tc.use_case_id
LEFT JOIN LATERAL (
  SELECT coverage_percentage
  FROM test_executions
  WHERE test_case_id = tc.id
  ORDER BY executed_at DESC
  LIMIT 1
) te ON true

GROUP BY uc.id, uc.key, uc.title, uc.component_id;

CREATE INDEX idx_use_case_coverage_component ON use_case_coverage(component_id);
CREATE INDEX idx_use_case_coverage_overall ON use_case_coverage(overall_coverage);
```

## MCP Tools

**Tool: `create_test_cases_from_use_case`**:
```typescript
{
  name: "create_test_cases_from_use_case",
  parameters: {
    use_case_id: string,
    auto_generate?: boolean // auto-generate from use case flows
  },
  returns: {
    suggested_test_cases: TestCase[],
    test_case_ids: string[]
  }
}
```

**Tool: `get_use_case_coverage`**:
```typescript
{
  name: "get_use_case_coverage",
  parameters: {
    use_case_id: string
  },
  returns: {
    use_case: UseCase,
    coverage: {
      overall: number,
      by_level: {
        unit: { coverage: number, test_count: number },
        integration: { coverage: number, test_count: number },
        e2e: { coverage: number, test_count: number }
      },
      test_cases: TestCase[],
      latest_executions: TestExecution[],
      coverage_gaps: string[]
    }
  }
}
```

**Tool: `get_component_test_coverage`**:
```typescript
{
  name: "get_component_test_coverage",
  parameters: {
    component_id: string
  },
  returns: {
    component: Component,
    use_cases: Array<{
      use_case: UseCase,
      coverage: number,
      test_counts: { unit: number, integration: number, e2e: number }
    }>,
    overall_component_coverage: number
  }
}
```

**Tool: `report_test_execution`** (called by CI/CD):
```typescript
{
  name: "report_test_execution",
  parameters: {
    test_case_key: string, // TC-AUTH-101
    status: "pass" | "fail" | "skip",
    coverage_percentage?: number,
    duration_ms: number,
    commit_hash?: string,
    ci_run_id?: string,
    error_message?: string
  }
}
```

## CI/CD Integration

**Example: Jest test with metadata**:
```typescript
// tests/e2e/auth/password-reset.spec.ts
// @test-case TC-AUTH-101
// @use-case UC-AUTH-003

describe('TC-AUTH-101: Complete password reset flow', () => {
  it('should allow user to reset password via email', async () => {
    // Test implementation...
  });
});
```

**CI pipeline reports to MCP**:
```yaml
# .github/workflows/test.yml
- name: Run tests
  run: npm test -- --coverage

- name: Report to AI Studio
  run: |
    # Parse test results
    # For each test execution:
    curl -X POST $MCP_SERVER/report_test_execution \
      -d '{
        "test_case_key": "TC-AUTH-101",
        "status": "pass",
        "coverage_percentage": 100,
        "duration_ms": 2340,
        "commit_hash": "${{ github.sha }}",
        "ci_run_id": "${{ github.run_id }}"
      }'
```

## Related Use Cases
- UC-BA-002: Create Use Case (origin of test cases)
- UC-BA-005: Advanced Use Case Search (shows coverage in search results)
- UC-QA-001: Test Story Implementation (executes test cases)
- UC-ARCH-002: View Code Quality Dashboard (component coverage view)

## Acceptance Criteria
- ✓ Test cases can be created from use cases
- ✓ Test cases specify test level (unit/integration/E2E)
- ✓ Test cases are linked to use cases (many-to-one)
- ✓ Use case coverage shows breakdown by test level
- ✓ Coverage percentages accurate from CI reports
- ✓ Coverage gaps are identified automatically
- ✓ Component-level coverage aggregates use case coverage
- ✓ Test execution history is tracked
- ✓ CI/CD integration reports test results automatically
- ✓ Coverage threshold warnings appear when < 80%
- ✓ BA can see which use cases lack coverage
- ✓ QA can prioritize based on coverage gaps
- ✓ Materialized view refreshes after each CI run
